# URMortgage

> URMortgage.online is a mortgage and property knowledge platform serving 29 countries with calculators, guides, and AI-powered Q&A.

## Core Pages

- [Mortgage Calculator](https://urmortgage.online/calculator/)
- [AI Mortgage Assistant](https://urmortgage.online/ask/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://urmortgage.online/privacy/)
- [Terms of Service](https://urmortgage.online/terms/)

## Country Hubs

- [Australia](https://urmortgage.online/australia/)
- [Belgium](https://urmortgage.online/belgium/)
- [Brazil](https://urmortgage.online/brazil/)
- [Canada](https://urmortgage.online/canada/)

- [France](https://urmortgage.online/france/)
